info.label: What
info.value: This config sets its own `colors` block - no theme needed, it just applies.

info.label: Roles
info.value: text uses 'default' (the terminal's own color) so it is readable on any background; accents are picked to work on light and dark.

info.label: Try
info.value: Run 'Greet someone' for prompt/input/error colors, 'Pick an environment' for choice colors.

items.name: Greet someone
items.description: A typed field: see the prompt, input and error colors (type digits to trigger the error).

items.name: Pick an environment
items.description: A choice: see the option and option_selected colors.

items.name: Run a command
items.description: A plain shell action: see the command-echo color.
